'''chapaza''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:tabber|tabber]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-p-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tabber|tabber]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| chapaza
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæpæzæth|chæpæzæth]] || [[word:chæpæzæj|chæpæzæj]] || [[word:chæpæzæsh|chæpæzæsh]] || [[word:chæpæzæ|chæpæzæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chapapazath|chapapazath]] || [[word:chapapazaj|chapapazaj]] || [[word:chapapazash|chapapazash]] || [[word:chapapaza|chapapaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chapazath|chapazath]] || [[word:chapazaj|chapazaj]] || [[word:chapazash|chapazash]] || [[word:chapaza|chapaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chapafzath|chapafzath]] || [[word:chapafzaj|chapafzaj]] || [[word:chapafzash|chapafzash]] || [[word:chapafzaf|chapafzaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chapazatha|chapazatha]] || [[word:chapazaja|chapazaja]] || [[word:chapazasha|chapazasha]] || [[word:chapazaka|chapazaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chapazath|chapazath]] || [[word:chapazaj|chapazaj]] || [[word:chapazash|chapazash]] || [[word:chapaza|chapaza]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chapazathal|chapazathal]] || [[word:chapazajal|chapazajal]] || [[word:chapazashal|chapazashal]] || [[word:chapazakal|chapazakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chapazathatha|chapazathatha]] || [[word:chapazajaja|chapazajaja]] || [[word:chapazashasha|chapazashasha]] || [[word:chapazaka|chapazaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chapazathan|chapazathan]] || [[word:chapazajan|chapazajan]] || [[word:chapazashan|chapazashan]] || [[word:chapazakan|chapazakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chapazathaoro|chapazathaoro]] || [[word:chapazajaoro|chapazajaoro]] || [[word:chapazashaoro|chapazashaoro]] || [[word:chapazakaoro|chapazakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
